title: Artemis II Mission Successfully Splashed Down

scenes.narration: Watch as the Artemis program reaches a historic milestone with a successful splashdown.
scenes.image_prompt: A stunning visual of the spacecraft re-entering the ocean with a glowing trail.

scenes.narration: The crew remains calm, ready to confirm the safe landing of the mission.
scenes.image_prompt: Closed-circuit camera showing the astronauts preparing for recovery.

scenes.narration: This marks another step toward lunar exploration and future missions.
scenes.image_prompt: A dramatic shot of the splash-down site with crews in action.

scenes.narration: The success brings hope for generations to come.
scenes.image_prompt: A closing frame with the spacecraft and astronauts in peace.

scenes.narration: Thank you for watching this incredible achievement.
scenes.image_prompt: Message showing astronaut smiles and mission highlights.

scenes.narration: Stay tuned for more space stories and updates.
scenes.image_prompt: A futuristic space view with bold text overlay.

scenes.narration: Join us again for more milestones in space exploration.
scenes.image_prompt: Dynamic background showing next mission preparations.
